notes: Golden question set for the Colonial Archives Graph-RAG retrieval. 'abstention' questions are out-of-corpus and MUST trigger the archive-first fallback. In-domain questions MUST NOT abstain and are scored on citation grounding + faithfulness; expected_doc_ids are filled from a live discovery pass (evals/discover.py -> results/discovery.json) so Recall@5 is measured against confirmed source documents.

questions.question: What is the capital of France?
Who is the current CEO of Tesla?
Explain how a transformer neural network works.
What were the main causes of the 2008 financial crisis?
Give me a recipe for chicken rice.
What is the population of Singapore in 2026?
Who won the FIFA World Cup in 2022?
What does the CO 273 archive say about quantum computing research?
What commodities were traded in the Straits Settlements according to the archive?
What does the archive record about colonial revenue and financial accounts?
What is recorded about opium revenue or the opium farm?
What does the archive say about tin mining or the tin trade?
What was the role of the Governor in the Straits Settlements?
What correspondence concerns Chinese immigration or labour?
What military or defence matters are recorded in the archive?
What trade or shipping with neighbouring territories is recorded?
What administrative or establishment matters are discussed in the correspondence?
What is recorded about land, plantations, or agriculture?
What legal or judicial matters appear in the correspondence?
What infrastructure or public works are mentioned in the archive?
